posts.author: DeanMD (Dean)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our company is looking for a feature that allows us to

  1. Apply automations across all boards seemlessly
  2. Allows us to add automation to multiple boards event after they are created

This would allow us to adapt quicker in terms of updating all of the boards at once when we fins an automation that is beneficial to the whole organization.

Ideally we think there should be an option for global and individual board automations.
